hero.headline: South Pizza in Port Elgin
hero.subheadline: Stone-baked pizzas, Indian-inspired favourites, sides, ice cream, and cold drinks for beach days, family takeout, and easy local dinners.

menuItems.longDescription: Discover the Ultimate Chicken Tikka Pizza Experience the perfect blend of eastern spices and western comfort food with our Chicken Tikka Pizza. Bold Flavors Packed in Every Bite Our Chicken Tikka Pizza is crafted using premium ingredients to ensure every bite is filled with rich, tantalizing goodness. Perfect for Any Occasion Whether it’s a casual family dinner, game night with friends, or a quick treat for yourself, the Chicken Tikka Pizza adds a touch of deliciousness to any moment. menuItems.name: Paneer Tikka (12 Pcs)
menuItems.longDescription: A Classic Delight: Paneer Tikka Looking for a perfect starter that is rich in Indian flavors and equally nutritious? Paneer Tikka is your answer. This classic dish is crafted with succulent cubes of paneer (Indian cottage cheese) marinated with aromatic spices, yogurt, and herbs, then grilled or roasted to perfection. Offering a delightful blend of textures and authentic taste, Paneer Tikka makes a flawless choice for all your gatherings, festive celebrations, or quiet evenings at home. Flavorful Marination for Ultimate Satisfaction The secret to Paneer Tikka’s vibrant flavor lies in its marination. The combination of spices, including turmeric, red chili powder, garam masala, cumin, and tangy yogurt, penetrates each cube, making every bite a burst of flavor. Think juicy, smoky paneer chunks paired with charred vegetables like bell peppers and onions—an irresistible dish that satisfies both your palate and nutritional needs. Versatility at Its Best Paneer Tikka shines not only as a starter but also as a versatile meal component. Add it to wraps, sandwiches, or salads, or serve it...

menuItems.name: Samosas – 2 Pieces
menuItems.longDescription: Discover the Authentic Taste of Samosas Samosas are a beloved snack known for their irresistible crunch and savory fillings. With their triangular shape and perfectly golden-brown crust, samosas hold a special place in cuisines worldwide, especially in Indian cooking. Whether you’re looking for a quick appetizer, a party snack, or a satisfying meal, samosas are the ultimate choice for any occasion. The Perfect Combination of Crispy and Savory Every bite of a samosa brings together a delightful combination of textures and flavors. The outer pastry is flaky yet crisp, and the inside is filled with a mix of flavorful ingredients. Traditional samosas often feature spiced potatoes, green peas, and a medley of rich seasonings like cumin, coriander, and turmeric. Some varieties may include protein-packed options such as chicken, lamb, or paneer, creating a unique taste experience for every preference. Why Choose Our Samosas? Our samosas are crafted with care, using high-quality ingredients and authentic recipes to bring you the best culinary experience. Whether you prefer classic...

Achieving the perfect Tandoori flavor requires more than just the right ingredients – it’s about the process. Our Tandoori Leg is marinated for hours, allowing the spices to deeply penetrate the juicy meat for an unmatched depth of flavor. Cooked to perfection, each piece boasts tender, smoky meat with crisp, charred edges that will have you craving more. Versatile and Ready-to-Serve The Tandoori Leg is incredibly versatile.
